nasb.text: after John had proclaimed before His coming a baptism of repentance to all the people of Israel.

esv.text: Before his coming, John had proclaimed a baptism of repentance to all the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 在他來臨之前，約翰早已向以色列全民宣講悔改的洗禮。

ccb.text: 在耶稣还未公开露面以前，约翰已经劝告以色列人要悔改，接受洗礼。

csbs.text: 在耶稣公开出来之前，约翰预先向所有以色列子民宣讲了悔改的洗礼。
